Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems to be a vacant room.[n]The door is tightly sealed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aragaki doesn't seem to be in his room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The room where Aragaki used[n]to live is now empty...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The door doesn't seem to be locked...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The room where Aragaki used[n]to live is now empty...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The room where Aragaki used[n]to live is now empty...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The room where Aragaki used[n]to live is now empty...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Ikutsuki asked me to[n]sort the items that Aragaki left behind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The door doesn't seem to be locked...[n]{f 1 1}
